titleStmt.title: SII 5.983: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 983. (A.R. No. 118 of 1896). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SECOND PRAKARA OF THE SAME TEMPLE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . puyal vāyppa vaḷam perukap poyyāta nāṉmaṟaiyiṉ ceyal vāyppat tirumakaḷum ceyamakaḷum ciṟantuvāḻa veṇmatipoṟ kuṭai viḷaṅka velaventa raṭivaṇaṅka maṇmaṭantai maṉaṅkaḷippa maṉuniti taḻaittoṅkac cakkaramuñ ceṅkolum tikkaṉai
ttum cela naṭappa kaṟppakālam puvi kāppa poṟppamainta muṭipuṉaintu cempoṉ virasiṁhāsa ṉattu puvaṉamuḻutuṭaiyāḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kopparakesari paṟmarāṉa tri puvaṉacacakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulottuṅkacoḻatevarkku yāṇṭu Eṭṭāvatu nāḷ kaṟkaṭakanāyaṟṟu pūrvapakṣa
ttu daśa miyum tiṅkaṭkiḻamaiyum peṟṟa Aṉiḻattiṉ ṉāḷRead rājādhi. rājādhirāja vaḷa nāṭṭu nāṅkūrnāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār śrīpātatūḷiccaruppetimaṅkalattu teṉpiṭākai coḻakeraḷanallūril kāṇiuṭaiya veḷḷaippaṉṟiyūr cānaṉāyakakoyiṟ peru
n taccaṉ Iṉṉāṭṭu Uṭaiyār tiruveṇkāṭuṭaiyārkku tirununtāviḷakkuppuṟamāka viṭṭa tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār śrīpātatūḷiccaruppetimaṅkalattu pirāmaṇaril kaśya paṉ śrīkṛṣṇa ṉ vāsu tevaṉum Ivaṉ tampi śrīkṛṣṇa cāttaṉum Ivaṉ tampi śrīkṛṣṇa Attiyūr Āḻvāṉum pakkal nāṉ vilaiko
ṇṭuṭaiyenāy Eṉṉutāy Irunta kollai Uḷppaṭṭa Iṉnilam muṉṟumāvukku melpāṟ kellai Āḷuṭaiyanāyaṉār tevatāṉattukku kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ kellai Avicāṉacomaṉ cāttaṉ nilattukku teṟkkum kiḻpārk kellai kāśya paṉ comaṉ tevaṉ mātevaṉ nilattukku meṟkku
m teṉpāṟ kelalai paṉavāsu tevaṉ kaṇṇaṉ nilattukku vaṭakkum Iṉṉāṉkellaiyuḷ naṭuvuppaṭṭa nilattu kuṭiirupput tiṭalum melnokkiṉa maramum kiḻnokkiṉa kiṇaṟum Uṭpaṭa koṭṭaka vāykkāl kaāle pāyavum vāravum Urimai Uṇṭāvutākavum IttevarRead āticaṇṭe.āticaṉṭeśva ratevar śrīpā
tattu taccaṉ nāyakakoyiṟ piccaṉ nīrvārttuviṭṭamaiyil Iṉṉilam caṇṭe- śva rapperuvilaiyāka Ilaiamutu toṭṭakuṭikaḷil kantamaṅkalamuṭaiyāṉ civatavaṉamuṭaiyāṉukku śrīpaṇṭārattu caṇṭeśva rapperuvilaikku muppatu kācu Oṭukki kāṇiyāka koṇṭu Iṉṉilat
tukku Ūrmāvintapaṭi kaṭamai Uṭaiyār tirucciṟṟampalamuṭaiyār śrīpātatūḷiccaruppetimaṅkalattu Iṟuttu Iṟaimikutikku Āṭṭaikku Oṭṭuppaṭiyāka Iṟukkum ney 6 10 nikki niṉṟa neykku Upaiyamāka Inta nāyakakoyiṟ piccaṉpakkal kaikkoṇṭa kācu 8 10
Ikkācu Eṇpatum Upaiyamāka Ivaṉ Aḷakkum ney 3 10 Āka ney 9 10 toṇṇūṟṟu nāḻiyum tevakaṇāyakaṉāle AḷattuRead aḷantu.taravukoḷḷa kaṭavanākavum Iṉṉila muṉṟumāvum Ivaṉukkum Ivaṉ vaṟkattāṟkku vilaiyum Oṟṟiyum
cellakkaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi cantirātittavarai cellakkaṭavatākavum Ippaṭi Icaiyaviṭṭamaikku Ippaṭiyaṉṟi maṟṟu kuṭimai Oṉṟum ceyyakkaṭavanallātānākavum Iṉṉilam muṉṟumāvum caṇṭeśva rapperuvilaiyāka viṟṟukkuṭuttamaikku .
Digital edition of SII 5.983 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
